# Customodoro

> Free customizable Pomodoro timer PWA with Classic and Reverse Pomodoro
> (Flowmodoro) modes, focus tracking, streaks, leaderboard,
> and offline support. Built by Brian Yabut (YabuTech). MIT license.

## App

- [Classic Pomodoro Timer](https://customodoro.vercel.app/): 25-minute countdown with customizable intervals, streaks, and analytics
- [Reverse Pomodoro Timer / Flowmodoro](https://customodoro.vercel.app/reverse): Count-up timer that earns breaks based on work duration

## Learn

- [What is the Pomodoro Technique?](https://customodoro.vercel.app/pomodoro): Educational article on the Pomodoro method and its variants
- [How Customodoro was built](https://customodoro.vercel.app/LEARN.md): Vanilla JS, PWA, Supabase, and Service Worker implementation notes

## Optional

- [Feedback & Bug Reports](https://customodoro.vercel.app/feedback)
